findings.title: Overview opens with one very long compound sentence
findings.detail: The first Overview paragraph is a single sentence packing mission, delegation chain (Marcus → writers → assembly), domain hooks (Bloom, cognitive load, backward design), six artifact types, style bible, and memory sidecar. Pre-pass shows no wall-of-text blocks by line count, but this structure is hard to scan quickly when the executing model must locate a specific constraint. The content is load-bearing, not filler; the issue is structural density for retrieval under compaction.
findings.action: Split into two or three shorter sentences while preserving every named concept (artifact types, style bible refresh rule, memory sidecar). Keep domain vocabulary intact.

findings.title: Overview and Identity both restate delegation and non-prose role
findings.detail: Overview already states delegation to Paige/Sophia/Caravaggio, Marcus context envelopes, and assembly of structured artifacts. Identity repeats senior instructional designer framing, Bloom/cognitive load/backward design, does NOT write prose, delegates to the same three writers, and specialist operation with Marcus. Scanner guidance flags same concept in Overview and Identity as potential duplication. Some repetition helps persona consistency; the tradeoff is modest token cost (~80–120 tokens) for agents that load both sections every activation.
findings.action: Keep one section as the canonical mission statement; shorten the other to non-overlapping traits (e.g., Identity = credentials and tone only, or Overview = one-sentence mission + pointer to Identity).

findings.title: Overview meets mission, domain, and downstream framing
findings.detail: Overview includes what Irene does and why, medical-education domain vocabulary, six artifact types with downstream consumers, style-bible discipline (re-read, never cached), memory learning loop, and interactive vs headless hint. Length is within ~10–12 sentence guidance when counting bullets as part of whole skill context; not excessive for a multi-delegation workflow agent.

findings.title: Communication Style examples are instructional, not padding
findings.detail: Quoted exemplar lines model pedagogical reasoning, delegation brief precision, and constructive feedback. This token spend shapes Irene’s voice and is appropriate for a domain expert who must sound consistent when routing to other agents.

findings.title: Principles skew outcome-first with selective design rationale
findings.detail: Numbered principles emphasize measurable objectives, cognitive load, Bloom alignment, backward design, and downstream artifact consumers—appropriate for a workflow facilitator plus instructional domain expert. Implementation detail stays in references (e.g., pedagogical-framework, delegation-protocol) rather than over-specifying HOW in SKILL.md.

findings.title: Capabilities tables use mandatory Load paths, not suggestive phrasing
findings.detail: Internal capabilities map to explicit ./references/ files. Delegation Protocol and artifact templates point to separate markdown files. SKILL.md stays ~131 lines with no large inline schemas; heavy detail is externalized appropriately.

findings.title: No separate root prompt files; SKILL.md carries config and activation
findings.detail: Pre-pass reports zero capability prompts at skill root. On Activation includes config paths, memory entry, course context, headless vs interactive branches, and delegation pointer—reducing risk that compaction drops a separate prompt without config. Tradeoff: single large SKILL must remain the anchor document.

skillmd_assessment.notes: SKILL.md is concise for a multi-capability delegating agent; tables route detail to references. Minor Overview/Identity overlap is the main efficiency nit. Persona and domain framing support informed autonomy without meta-explaining the model to itself.

summary.assessment: Prompt craft is strong: no pre-pass defensive padding, back-references, or suggestive loading; persona voice and outcome-driven principles are well invested. The main improvements are structural (denser Overview sentence) and a small trim of Overview/Identity overlap.
summary.top_improvement: Break the first Overview paragraph into shorter sentences and deduplicate the delegation thesis between Overview and Identity to save tokens without losing persona.
